message:
chore(beads): track ft-npobg — saved-search runner misses include_highlights field

Adds a single new beads tracking row (ft-npobg) flagging a follow-on
build break from the ft-okhhj two-stage FTS optimization (commit
6a0590d2). The CLI saved-search runner in
crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs (~line 23701) still constructs
SearchOptions directly without the new include_highlights field,
which now causes E0063 "missing field" under cargo test -p frankenterm
--bin ft.

The issue body contains the reproducer (the rch exec invocation that
trips the failure) and points at the fix direction — set
include_highlights consistently with include_snippets in the saved-
search runner the same way query_contract.rs and web/handlers.rs
already do.

This is bookkeeping only; the actual fix will land in a separate
commit on a different branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
